name: Check of Get button before log in from the Settings tab in LYRASIS Reads
fullName: Book detail view screen: Check of Get button before log in from the Settings tab in LYRASIS Reads

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search for "Lemon" and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Open book with GET action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click GET action button on book details screen
Then  Sing in screen is opened

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of Get button before log in from the Settings tab in LYRASIS Reads
